visible_keys.app.name: OpenConstructionERP
visible_keys.dashboard.kpi_hint: Summary across all projects. Values update as you add estimates and schedule activities.
visible_keys.dashboard.no_projects_desc: Create your first project to get started
visible_keys.dashboard.step_ai_search_desc: Generate vector embeddings for semantic cost matching
visible_keys.dashboard.step_build_boq_desc: Create a Bill of Quantities with AI assistance
visible_keys.dashboard.step_connect_ai_desc: Add your API keys for AI-powered estimation
visible_keys.dashboard.step_create_project_desc: Start your first construction estimation project
visible_keys.dashboard.step_load_db_desc: Import regional pricing data with 55,000+ items
visible_keys.dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your projects, key metrics, and recent activity
visible_keys.dashboard.subtitle_2: Smart resource planning for your construction projects
visible_keys.modules.title: Modules
visible_keys.modules.cat_regional_desc: Country-specific BOQ import/export formats and classification standards
visible_keys.modules.community_desc: OpenConstructionERP has a modular plugin architecture. Anyone can create custom modules — cost databases, regional standards, CAD converters, analytics dashboards, integrations with external systems, or any other functionality. Your module will appear in this Modules section and can be installed by any user.
visible_keys.modules.community_type_data_desc: Regional cost databases, resource catalogs, material libraries, classification standards (DIN, NRM, SNIP, etc.)
visible_keys.modules.community_type_integration_desc: Connect with SAP, Procore, MS Project, BIM 360, PlanRadar, Primavera, or any external system via API
visible_keys.modules.community_type_tools_desc: Custom reports, dashboards, calculators, format converters, AI models, or any specialized construction tool
visible_keys.modules.community_how: Each module is a Python package with a manifest.py file. Create your module, test it locally, and share it with the community. Even if you just have an idea — send us a text description and we will help you build it.
visible_keys.nav.request_custom_module_hint: Missing something? Tell us what you need
visible_keys.nav.group_estimation_desc: Core tools: projects, BOQ, costs, and assemblies
visible_keys.nav.group_operations_desc: Daily site operations — service tickets, equipment, diary, subcontractor portal, resources
visible_keys.nav.group_commercial_desc: Commercial pipeline — CRM, contracts, bids, variations, suppliers, property development
visible_keys.onboarding.ai_subtitle: Connect an AI provider for smart features:
visible_keys.onboarding.cost_db_hint: You can add more databases later in Cost Database → Import.
visible_keys.onboarding.cost_db_subtitle: Load a pricing database for accurate estimates. Choose your region:
visible_keys.onboarding.project_subtitle: Set up your first project to get started.
visible_keys.onboarding.welcome_hint: Free and open source. No credit card required.
visible_keys.onboarding.welcome_subtitle: The professional construction estimation workspace.\nSet up your environment in a few simple steps.
visible_keys.onboarding.company_type_title: What type of company are you?
visible_keys.onboarding.company_type_subtitle: We will pre-configure the best set of modules for your workflow.
visible_keys.onboarding.company_general_contractor_de: We build projects — estimation, procurement, site management
visible_keys.onboarding.company_estimator_desc: We focus on cost estimation and quantity takeoff
visible_keys.onboarding.company_project_management_de: We manage large projects — planning, communication, documents
visible_keys.onboarding.company_architecture_desc: We design buildings — BIM, documents, CDE
visible_keys.onboarding.company_full_enterprise_desc: We need everything — full construction lifecycle
visible_keys.onboarding.modules_subtitle: Pre-selected based on your company type. Toggle any module on or off.
visible_keys.onboarding.mod_boq_desc: Bill of Quantities editor with hierarchical positions
visible_keys.onboarding.mod_5d_desc: 5D cost model with earned value tracking
visible_keys.onboarding.mode_subtitle: You can switch between modes anytime in Settings.
visible_keys.onboarding.mode_simple_desc: I'm getting started — show me the essentials. A clean interface with the most important features.
visible_keys.onboarding.mode_advanced_desc: I'm experienced — show me everything. Full professional toolset with all options visible.
visible_keys.onboarding.step1.title: Navigation Sidebar
visible_keys.onboarding.step1.description: The sidebar gives you quick access to all modules: projects, estimates, cost databases, schedules, and more.
visible_keys.onboarding.step2.title: Projects
visible_keys.onboarding.step2.description: Start here by creating your first project. Each project holds BOQs, schedules, and documents in one place.
visible_keys.onboarding.step3.title: Bill of Quantities
visible_keys.onboarding.step3.description: Build detailed estimates with the BOQ editor — hierarchical positions, assemblies, and real-time cost roll-up.
visible_keys.onboarding.step4.title: Cost Databases
visible_keys.onboarding.step4.description: Browse and manage cost rate databases including the built-in CWICR with 55 000+ positions across 9 languages.
visible_keys.onboarding.step5.title: Simple / Advanced Mode
visible_keys.onboarding.step5.description: Toggle between Simple mode (essential tools) and Advanced mode (all features including tendering and scheduling).
